markets.no_sub_title: Emma Raducanu
markets.rules_primary: If Emma Raducanu wins the Raducanu vs Anisimova professional tennis match in the 2026 WTA Indian Wells Round Of 32 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
